channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top Roblox players by in-game wealth and achievements
item.description: The article highlights the top 10 Roblox players ranked by their in-game wealth, measured through RAP values (Roblox Asset Points). David Baszucki, the founder of Roblox, is noted as the first billion...

item.title: Senate opens Sara Duterte impeachment trial with key developments
item.description: The Senate convened as an impeachment court on July 8, 2026, to formally open the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. This 92-day proceeding marked a historic moment in Philippine politi...

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 After Delay Amid National Security Concerns
item.description: OpenAI, the US-based artificial intelligence research lab, has announced the public launch of its most advanced model, GPT-5.6, set for Thursday. The delay in the release followed government requests ...

item.title: SpaceX Shares Drop Despite Nasdaq-100 Inclusion Amid Market Volatility
item.description: SpaceX shares fell to their lowest-ever closing price on Tuesday despite the company’s recent inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 index. The stock slid 6.8% to $149.47, more than 25% below its June 16 high of...

item.title: Political Interference in Football: FIFA Faces Criticism Over Trump's Involvement
item.description: The 2026 World Cup has been plagued by political controversies that overshadow the sporting events. Initial issues included visa denials for officials from certain countries and a Somali referee barre...

item.title: Woden man wins $40 million Powerball jackpot after unregistered ticket
item.description: A man from Woden has claimed a $40 million Powerball jackpot after his winning ticket remained unregistered for weeks. The winner, an ACT resident, only discovered his fortune when news reports highli...

item.title: US-Iran Tensions Escalate Over Strait of Hormuz Attacks and Maritime Security Disputes
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the United States and Iran following Iran's attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. has launched retaliatory strikes against...

item.title: Trump Launches Iran Strikes Amid NATO Summit Focused on Defense Spending
item.description: During the NATO summit in Ankara, President Donald Trump surprised allies by launching military strikes against Iran following attacks on merchant ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. actions disru...

item.title: Protesters urge Senate to delay Fasina’s ambassadorial confirmation over legal issues
item.description: Scores of demonstrators stormed the National Assembly in Abuja, calling on the Senate to suspend the confirmation of Prof Abayomi Fasina as a non-career ambassador. The protests stem from allegations ...

item.title: Republican Congressman Faces Backlash for Comments on Democratic Candidate's Scandal
item.description: Rep. Brandon Gill (R-TX) faced widespread criticism after making controversial remarks about Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner's alleged misconduct allegations. During an appearance on ...

item.title: KeNHA approves separate toll rates for Rironi-Mau Summit Highway sections under 30-year concession agreements
item.description: Motorists using the Rironi-Mau Summit Highway will pay different toll charges depending on the section of the road they use after the Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) approved separate tariff...

item.title: Ukraine-Russia War Updates: Missile Strikes and NATO Summit Developments
item.description: Ukraine has faced fresh missile strikes from Russia, with Kyiv reporting fires and injuries in the capital, marking the third such attack this week. The strikes, which caused damage to storage areas a...

item.title: Study of 47 Million Galaxies Suggests Large-Scale Cosmic Structure May Persist Beyond Current Cosmological Expectations
item.description: A newly published study in Nature challenges one of the foundational assumptions of modern cosmology by suggesting that the universe may retain organized large-scale structures over much greater dista...

item.title: Wajir Brothers Make Aviation History as First Pilots to Share Cockpit
item.description: Two brothers from Wajir county, Captain Abdullahi Adan Hassan and First Officer Omar Adan, have made aviation history by sharing a cockpit on the same commercial passenger flight. The siblings operate...

item.title: Evan Roos's Potential as Springbok No 8 Highlighted by Vermeulen's Insights
item.description: Duane Vermeulen, a former Springbok captain, has assessed Evan Roos's potential as a No 8 contender for the national team. Vermeulen emphasized that Roos needs to adapt to the higher intensity of inte...

item.title: Macquarie faces shareholder scrutiny over KPMG audit process transparency
item.description: Investors are set to challenge Macquarie Group's board at its annual general meeting (AGM) on July 23, demanding accountability for the contentious decision to appoint KPMG as an auditor. Governance f...

item.title: Mutual Strikes Escalate US-Iran Tensions Amid Ceasefire Concerns
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) launched missile and drone strikes on US military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait in response to American attacks, according to state broadcaster IRIB. The strikes ...

item.title: August total solar eclipse path and viewing details for Canada and Europe
item.description: The article explains the August 12, 2026 total solar eclipse, detailing its path across northern Russia, Greenland, Iceland, Spain, and Portugal. It highlights that Spain will experience a total eclip...

item.title: Reform UK seeks NCA investigation into potential leaks of private financial data
item.description: Reform UK deputy leader Richard Tice has written to the National Crime Agency (NCA) requesting an investigation into whether the agency leaked his private financial information to the media. Payments ...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Defense Objections Intensify During Impeachment Trial
item.description: The second day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial saw her defense lawyer, Carlo Narvasa, repeatedly object to House private prosecutor Amando Ligutan's proceedings, marking a tense and...
